case_title: PETERS, RICHARD VS BRICKERS TOW SERVICE INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETERS, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRICKERS TOW SERVICE INC. $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $475.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BRICKERS TOW SERVICE INC.

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BRICKERS TOW SERVICE INC. HEARING SET FOR APR-30-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
